phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition hall is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sala de exposiciones temporales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah SAH-lah deh eks-poh-see-SYOH-nes tem-poh-RAH-les?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, siga las flechas amarillas.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah SEE-gah LAHS FLEHTH-ahs ah-mah-REEL-lahs
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, follow the yellow arrows.

responses.english: Ground floor, follow the yellow arrows.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah SEE-gah LAHS FLEHTH-ahs ah-mah-REEL-lahs
responses.french: Planta baja, siga las flechas amarillas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cube structure viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la plataforma de vistas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah plah-tah-FOHR-mah deh VEE-stahs?

likely_response.local: Sube a la azotea, junto al cubo rojo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-beh AH LAH ah-thoh-TEH-ah HOON-toh AHL KOO-boh ROH-hoh

responses.phonetic: SOO-beh AH LAH ah-thoh-TEH-ah HOON-toh AHL KOO-boh ROH-hoh
responses.french: Sube a la azotea, junto al cubo rojo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the rooftop terrace entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada a la terraza?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh es-TA la en-TRA-da a la te-RA-sa?

likely_response.local: No hay acceso público a la terraza.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH AHY ahth-THEH-soh PÚB-lee-koh AH LAH tehr-RAH-thah
likely_response.translation_en: There is no public access to the terrace.

responses.english: There is no public access to the terrace.
responses.phonetic: NOH AHY ahth-THEH-soh PÚB-lee-koh AH LAH tehr-RAH-thah
responses.french: No hay acceso público a la terraza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Muelle Uno after visiting
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego al Muelle Uno desde aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: KÓ-moh YEH-goh AHL moo-EHL-leh OO-noh DEH-sdeh ah-k-Í

likely_response.local: Salga, gire a la derecha en Muelle Heredia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHL-gah HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah EHN moo-EHL-leh eh-reh-DEE-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Exit and walk five minutes towards the port.

responses.english: Exit and walk five minutes towards the port.
responses.phonetic: SAHL-gah HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah EHN moo-EHL-leh eh-reh-DEE-ah
responses.french: Salga, gire a la derecha en Muelle Heredia.
